title: Workhorse Delivers 20 Trucks in Q3, Including Major FedEx Order
text: Workhorse delivered 20 trucks during Q3 2024, including 15 W56 step vans to FedEx. This delivery represents meaningful progress in commercialization efforts for the company. Beyond the initial FedEx order, Workhorse secured purchase orders from three parcel delivery independent service providers for its W56 step vans, with orders for seven W56 electric step vans. The orders came within 30 days following the company's participation at the FedEx Forward Service Provider Summit. The company achieved a 50% reduction in staff and a decrease in cash burn rate to about $3.5 million per month. As of September 30, 2024, Workhorse had only $3.2 million in cash and cash equivalents, indicating ongoing financial pressures despite cost-cutting measures.
